name: Crisp Chocolate Truffles
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy medium saucepan, combine marshmallow cream, butter, and chocolate chips.
2. Cook over low heat until the chocolate is melted and the mixture is smooth, stirring constantly.
3. Remove from heat.
4. Stir cereal into the hot chocolate mixture, mixing until thoroughly combined.
5. Drop the mixture by rounded measuring teaspoons onto waxed paper-lined cookie sheets.
6. Refrigerate about 1 hour, until firm.
7. In the top of a double boiler over hot water, melt bittersweet chocolate and shortening.
8. Dip each chocolate ball in the melted chocolate and place on the waxed paper-lined cookie sheet.
9. Drizzle with melted white chocolate chips.
10. Refrigerate until firm.
11. To serve, place in small candy paper cups.
Makes about 4 1/2 dozen truffles.
